name: Taco Bell Meat Seasoning
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the first group of ingredients and sift together three times.
2. Add the dry mustard, turmeric, sugar, paprika, and seasoned salt to the mixture.
3. Transfer the combined seasoning into a bottle with a tight-fitting cap.
4. Store in a cool place away from direct sunlight; use within six months or refrigerate for up to one year.
5. For taco seasoning, mix 2 tablespoons of the last group of ingredients with 3 tablespoons of the first mixture and cook with 1-1 1/2 pounds ground beef.
